# Upstream JCVI Source

- Source directory used during construction: `references/upstream/jcvi`
- Target vendored directory: `jcvi-genomelens/src/jcvi`
- Declared upstream version: `1.6.5`
- Patchset name: `windows-genomelens`

The vendored tree is kept separate from GenomeLens shell logic. Any future edits to `src/jcvi/` must be recorded in `patchset.md`.
